description: Represents an AWS Step Functions state machine execution.

ExecutionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the execution.
ExecutionArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the execution.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StateMachineArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the state machine that was executed.
StateMachineArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the state machine that was executed.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

StateMachineName.description: The name of the state machine, extracted from the execution ARN.
StateMachineName.markdownDescription:
The name of the state machine, extracted from the execution ARN.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 80  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the execution.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 80  
Update requires: Replacement

Input.description: The string that contains the JSON input data for the execution.
Input.markdownDescription:
The string that contains the JSON input data for the execution.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 262144  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.description: The current status of the execution.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the execution.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: RUNNING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED | TIMED_OUT | ABORTED | PENDING_REDRIVE  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

StartDate.markdownDescription:
The date the execution started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RedriveCount.description: The number of times the execution has been redriven.
RedriveCount.markdownDescription:
The number of times the execution has been redriven.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RedriveStatus.markdownDescription:
Indicates whether or not an execution can be redriven.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: REDRIVABLE | NOT_REDRIVABLE | REDRIVABLE_BY_MAP_RUN  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
